privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real Sleep.csv dataset from Gosset's 1908 study (downloaded from JASP data library). While the task description claims there are 20 participants assigned to two groups, the dataset actually contains 10 participants, each measured twice (IDs 1-10 repeat for each group, 20 observations total). The data contains columns: 'extra' (hours of extra sleep), 'group' (1 or 2), and 'ID'.
